title: Ollama Elite Folder Structure Enforcement
description: Strict validation rules for folder structure up to 5 levels deep. MANDATE: All files must conform to this schema.

level1_root.description: Root project directory - maximum 10 top-level directories

level2_application_package.description: Main application package (e.g., ollama/) - domain-oriented organization

level3_domain_container.description: Domain container - clear boundary for single responsibility
rules: MANDATE: ONLY __init__.py file allowed at Level 3
MANDATE: NO business logic in Level 3 files

level4_functional_container.description: Functional specialization - containers for specific concerns
